days.label: Week 1 · Mon — Back Squat Strength
warmup: 5-8 min easy row or bike
Leg swings, hip openers, ankle rocks
Back squat: 2-3 warmup sets building to the first working %

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.notes: Primary strength lift. 5 working sets of 5 at 68% of your back-squat 1RM. Rest 2-3 min between sets. Brace hard, full depth, controlled down and drive up.

blocks.name: Romanian Deadlift
blocks.notes: Posterior-chain builder. Soft knees, push hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, stop at mid-shin. 3 x 8, controlled.

blocks.name: Walking Lunge
blocks.notes: Single-leg strength and knee health. Dumbbells or empty bar. 3 x 10 each leg.

blocks.name: Core — Hanging Leg Raise
blocks.notes: 3 x 12 controlled, no swing. Sub with plank 3 x 45s if grip is fried.

days.label: Week 1 · Tue — Murph Engine
warmup: 400m easy jog
Band pull-aparts, scap pull-ups, arm circles
2 rounds: 10 air squats + 5 push-ups to prime

blocks.name: Run Intervals
blocks.notes: Build your engine without frying your legs. 4 x 400m at a comfortable-hard pace, walk 90s between. Smooth and controlled — this is base-building.

blocks.name: Pull-up Volume
blocks.notes: Accumulate 40 total reps however you need — strict, bands, or negatives. Small sets, lots of rest. Quality over grind.

blocks.name: Push-up Volume
blocks.notes: Accumulate 80 total push-ups in clean sets (e.g. 8 x 10). Full range, no sagging hips.

blocks.name: Air Squats
blocks.notes: 100 total, unbroken sets of 25. Full depth, stand tall each rep.

days.label: Week 1 · Wed — Deadlift & Posterior Chain
warmup: 5 min row
Hip hinge drills, glute bridges, cat-cow
Deadlift: build in 2-3 sets to the first working %

blocks.name: Deadlift
blocks.notes: Heavy posterior-chain day. 4 x 5 at 65% of your deadlift 1RM. Reset each rep (no touch-and-go on the heavy sets), neutral spine, drive the floor away.

blocks.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
blocks.notes: Glute strength that carries the deadlift and squat. 3 x 10, 1-second squeeze at the top.

blocks.name: Back Extension
blocks.notes: 3 x 12 for the spinal erectors and glutes. Add a plate to your chest if bodyweight is easy.

blocks.name: Farmer Carry
blocks.notes: 3 heavy carries, ~30-40m each. Tall posture, braced core. Builds grip and trunk for Murph and pulls.

days.label: Week 1 · Fri — Speed Pulls & Front Squat
warmup: 5 min bike
Front-rack & wrist mobility, band good-mornings
Front squat: 2 warmup sets to the first %

blocks.name: Speed Deadlift
blocks.notes: Explosive pulls for rate of force and a second posterior-chain exposure. 6 x 2 at 60% of deadlift 1RM. Every rep as fast as possible off the floor, reset between reps. Rest ~60-90s.

blocks.name: Front Squat
blocks.notes: Keeps the quads and upper back strong without the axial load of another heavy back-squat day. 4 x 5 at 68% of front-squat 1RM. Tall chest, elbows high.

blocks.name: Good Morning
blocks.notes: 3 x 10, light-to-moderate. Hamstrings and erectors. Slow eccentric, soft knees.

blocks.name: Strict Pull-ups
blocks.notes: 3 max-quality sets, strict. Direct Murph carryover and back strength. Add weight if you get 12+ strict.

days.label: Week 1 · Sat — Quarter Murph
warmup: 800m easy jog to open the legs
Full-body dynamic stretch, shoulders and hips
2 easy rounds: 5 pull-ups / 10 push-ups / 15 air squats (no vest)

blocks.name: Quarter Murph
blocks.notes: 400m run, then 25 pull-ups / 50 push-ups / 75 air squats (partition as 5 rounds of 5 pull-ups / 10 push-ups / 15 air squats — 'Cindy' style), then 400m run. No vest — build pacing first. Scale pull-ups with a band if needed and keep push-ups full range. Log your total time in the workout notes.

blocks.name: 'Cindy' Rounds — 5 rounds

blocks.name: Run — 5 x 400m

blocks.notes: One mile at a strong, sustainable effort. Note your time to track engine progress.

days.label: Week 8 · Wed — Deadlift & Posterior Chain
warmup: 5 min row
Hip hinge drills, glute bridges, cat-cow
Deadlift: build in 2-3 sets to the first working %

blocks.name: Deadlift
blocks.notes: Heavy posterior-chain day. 4 x 1 at 85% of your deadlift 1RM. Reset each rep (no touch-and-go on the heavy sets), neutral spine, drive the floor away.

blocks.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
blocks.notes: Glute strength that carries the deadlift and squat. 3 x 10, 1-second squeeze at the top.

blocks.name: Back Extension
blocks.notes: 3 x 12 for the spinal erectors and glutes. Add a plate to your chest if bodyweight is easy.

blocks.name: Farmer Carry
blocks.notes: 3 heavy carries, ~30-40m each. Tall posture, braced core. Builds grip and trunk for Murph and pulls.

days.label: Week 8 · Fri — Speed Pulls & Front Squat
warmup: 5 min bike
Front-rack & wrist mobility, band good-mornings
Front squat: 2 warmup sets to the first %

blocks.name: Speed Deadlift
blocks.notes: Explosive pulls for rate of force and a second posterior-chain exposure. 5 x 2 at 72% of deadlift 1RM. Every rep as fast as possible off the floor, reset between reps. Rest ~60-90s.

blocks.name: Front Squat
blocks.notes: Keeps the quads and upper back strong without the axial load of another heavy back-squat day. 3 x 2 at 82% of front-squat 1RM. Tall chest, elbows high.

blocks.name: Good Morning
blocks.notes: 3 x 10, light-to-moderate. Hamstrings and erectors. Slow eccentric, soft knees.

blocks.name: Strict Pull-ups
blocks.notes: 3 max-quality sets, strict. Direct Murph carryover and back strength. Add weight if you get 12+ strict.

Week 12 · Mon — Squat Test Day
warmup: 6-8 min easy bike or row
Leg swings, hip openers, ankle rocks, 2 empty-bar squat sets
Ramp singles as described in block A

blocks.name: Back Squat — 1RM Test
blocks.notes: Warm up in small jumps: 5 @ 40%, 3 @ 55%, 2 @ 70%, 1 @ 80%, 1 @ 88%, then take singles up to a new max. Stop when bar speed dies or depth/back position breaks. Log your best make on the Maxes tab afterward.

sets.description: Optional 2nd attempt if the first flew up

blocks.name: Back-off Squat
blocks.notes: Once tested, one easy volume set to bank a little work. Keep it crisp.

days.label: Week 12 · Sat — Full Murph — TIME TRIAL
warmup: 800m easy jog to open the legs
Full-body dynamic stretch, shoulders and hips

blocks.name: Full Murph — TIME TRIAL
blocks.notes: 1 mile run, then 100 pull-ups / 200 push-ups / 300 air squats (partition as 20 rounds of 5 pull-ups / 10 push-ups / 15 air squats — 'Cindy' style), then 1 mile run. Wear a 20 lb vest. This is the test — go for a PR time and log it. Pace the opening run, don't blow up on the early rounds. Scale pull-ups with a band if needed and keep push-ups full range. Log your total time in the workout notes.
